medication_treatment: continue the patient on bumex 2 milligrams once daily
plan_followup: refer the patient for a consultation with a registered dietitian
schedule a follow-up appointment in three months
advise the patient to weigh themselves daily and call if they gain three pounds in two days
advise the patient to purchase a blood pressure cuff and keep a log of their blood pressures and what they have eaten
set an alarm on their phone to remind them to take their medications
